name: EMILY's List
subject: 5 years. 162 abortion providers. 300 abortion restrictions.
body:
|
---
| | [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7841/24c69fd9/ec8923df/18e58be3/3597315567/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170508_email_ProtectChoiceStateLegs?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=WQEFE511N_digital_email_20170508_ProtectChoice_inact&source=WQEFE511N_digital_email_20170508_ProtectChoice_inact") [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7841/24c69fd9/ec8923df/18e58a1c/3597315567/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170508_email_ProtectChoiceStateLegs?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=WQEFE511N_digital_email_20170508_ProtectChoice_inact&source=WQEFE511N_digital_email_20170508_ProtectChoice_inact") [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7841/24c69fd9/ec8923df/18e58a1d/3597315567/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170508_email_ProtectChoiceStateLegs?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE511N_digital_email_20170508_ProtectChoice_inact&source=WQEFE511N_digital_email_20170508_ProtectChoice_inact") [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7841/24c69fd9/ec8923df/18e58a1e/3597315567/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170508_email_ProtectChoiceStateLegs?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE511N_digital_email_20170508_ProtectChoice_inact&source=WQEFE511N_digital_email_20170508_ProtectChoice_inact")

name: Tom Perez
subject: Let's flip this House seat in Montana
body:
Help elect Rob Quist in Montana.
---
**Split a donation between Rob Quist and the DNC to help elect Rob to Congress and Democrats around the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e774214/3093729986/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rob-Quist-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd")****
Friend --

20 years ago.

That's the last time a Democrat held Montana's seat in the House of Representatives.

But in a couple of weeks, we have a chance to flip that seat from red to blue and elect someone who will represent Montana values in Congress -- standing up for working people, protecting affordable health care and Medicare, and demanding equality and fair treatment for all.

**[Can you help Democrats fight back and send Rob Quist to Congress by splitting a $10 donation between his campaign and the DNC?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e774215/3093729986/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rob-Quist-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-++CUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelistcommaletterke&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd")**

A lot of folks know Rob for his singing. But he also uses his voice to speak up for what's right and fight against the kinds of policies that are made in Washington but hurt families in Montana and across the country.

We need more Democrats like Rob Quist in Congress.

But he can't win this special election alone -- that's why I'm coming to you and counting on our grassroots team to help out.

Pitch in $3 or more today to Rob's campaign and the DNC to support Rob and help elect more Democrats across the country.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Rob Quist for Montana.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e774212/3093729986/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e774213/3093729986/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e774210/3093729986/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e774211/3093729986/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e77421e/3093729986/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e77421f/3093729986/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rob-Quist-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd")
** Thanks for stepping up in this big race.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e77421c/3093729986/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e77421d/3093729986/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e77421a/3093729986/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf91/4067b0a/2fcdfe090/7e77421b/3093729986/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_tp_nd&source=em_20170509_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170509_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Sen. Patty Murray (via DSCC.org)
subject: Stand against Trumpcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Moms in tennis shoes are furious about what Trumpcare will cost our families and we're fighting harder than ever to stop it.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170509-Murray-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Team,

Years ago, I got my start in politics when I was told I couldn't make a difference because I was "just a mom in tennis shoes."

I took that as a challenge, and I decided this mom in tennis shoes was going to make a difference. And every step of the way, I haven't forgotten the importance of regular people who decide to make their voices heard and truly make a difference.

Now, I have a message for Republicans: moms in tennis shoes, and people across the country, are furious about what Trumpcare would mean for our families, and we are going to fight as hard as we can to stop it.

This latest version of Trumpcare is even worse than the version that people across the country rejected just weeks ago.

It would raise premiums and undo protections for people with pre-existing conditions, take coverage away from tens of millions of people, end Medicaid as we know it, cut off access to critical health care services at Planned Parenthood, and more -- all while giving insurance companies and the very wealthy massive tax breaks.

[**Make your voice heard. Chip in $1 right now to stand with Democratic senators against Trumpcare and fight for quality, affordable health care for all.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170509-Murray-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

President Trump and Republican leaders are breaking their promises to the American people: They promised they would cover pre-existing conditions, but with this bill, they're not just leaving them out -- they're adding more.

And yet, Republicans gave their leaders a _standing ovation_ on the House floor as he called for support for Trumpcare. A standing ovation for a bill that would rip health care away from people across the country.

This isn't about care, it's about giving President Trump a political win -- but women and families nationwide are going to fight back harder than ever to send this disastrous bill straight to a dead-end in the Senate.

I'll be fighting harder than ever, too -- you have my word.

**Chip in $1 right now to show Republicans you 're committed to the fight against Trumpcare:**

[**http://dscc.org/commit-to-stopping-trumpcare**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170509-Murray-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Senator Patty Murray

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e703/2b07114c/52ee0bad/736ef553/3160110516/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e703/2b07114c/52ee0bad/736ef552/3160110516/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e703/2b07114c/52ee0bad/736ef54d/3160110516/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Keith Ellison
subject: re: 16 days
body:
Help elect Rob Quist in Montana.
---
**Split a donation between Rob Quist and the DNC to help elect Rob to Congress and Democrats around the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739b0/3471101368/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rob-Quist-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1")****
Friend --

I can tell you first hand that a lot of tough decisions get made in the final two weeks of a close campaign, and whether you win or lose can depend on whether you made the right ones.

At the end of the day, when everything is on the line, a lot of those choices come down to what you have in the bank. And the stakes are even higher when you know you're being vastly outspent. That's what Rob Quist is up against right now in the special congressional election in Montana.

With only 16 days to go, Rob's campaign is finalizing those all-important decisions right now. It's not enough to talk about how much we need to win this race -- it's time to put our money where our mouths are.

Help make sure Rob Quist has everything he needs to win. Donate to his campaign and the DNC right away.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Rob Quist for Montana.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739b1/3471101368/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739be/3471101368/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739bf/3471101368/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739bc/3471101368/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739bd/3471101368/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739ba/3471101368/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rob-Quist-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1")
** We'll split your donation between Rob's campaign and the DNC to help him win his seat and elect Democrats across the country.

Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739bb/3471101368/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739b8/3471101368/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e7739b9/3471101368/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfa8/4067b0a/2fcca2a39/7e773946/3471101368/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&source=em_20170509_ke_v4s1&refcode=em_20170509_ke_v4s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: Help elect Rob Quist in Montana. Split a donation between Rob Quist and the DNC to help elect Rob to Congress and Democrats around the country. ""** Friend -- I can tell you first hand that a lot of tough decisions get made in the final two weeks of a close campaign, and whether you win or lose can depend on whether you made the right ones. At the end of the day, when everything is on the line, a lot of those choices come down to what you have in the bank. And the stakes are even higher when you know you're being vastly outspent. That's what Rob Quist is up against right now in the special congressional election in Montana. With only 16 days to go, Rob's campaign is finalizing those all-important decisions right now. It's not enough to talk about how much we need to win this race -- it's time to put our money where our mouths are. Help make sure Rob Quist has everything he needs to win. Donate to his campaign and the DNC right away. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Rob Quist for Montana. "" "" "" "" "" "" ** We'll split your donation between Rob's campaign and the DNC to help him win his seat and elect Democrats across the country. Thanks, Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: ICYMI (In case you missed it)...
body:
The AHCA has passed in the House, and the only thing standing between it and Trump's desk, where it will be signed into law, is the Senate.
**There's a huge difference between what Trump says and what he does when it comes to health care:**
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d07/43f17890/db8e803e/6203ae19/3013248986/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca?source=em170509-full")

**The AHCA has passed in the House, and the only thing standing between it and Trump's desk, where it will be signed into law, is the Senate.**
**[Call your senators and tell them that the majority of Americans support Medicare for All, not gutting health care. Tell them to vote NO on the so-called American Health Care Act.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d07/43f17890/db8e803e/6203ae19/3013248986/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca?source=em170509-full")**

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a five-alarm fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
"General Flynn was compromised in regard to the Russians." | | **_" General Flynn was compromised in regard to the Russians."_

-Sally Yates to the Senate Judiciary Subcommittee, 5/8/17**
---

Yesterday, Americans heard former Acting Attorney General Sally Yates testify about how she tried to warn the Trump White House that America's national security might be compromised in regard to the Russians. In any White House that should have been the equivalent of a five-alarm fire.

But we know now that President Trump and his team did nothing -- nothing at all. They did nothing until 18 days later, when the story broke in the _Washington Post_ that National Security Advisor Michael Flynn had lied about his Russia ties, and public pressure forced the White House to remove him from his position.

Let me be clear. Right now, we face two very serious issues. The first is getting to the bottom of the Russian interference in our election and preventing it from ever happening again. The second is figuring out why Congressional Republicans and the Trump administration are more focused on attacking American patriots like Sally Yates than on taking this investigation about Russia's interference seriously.

[**It 's time to put pressure on every member of Congress to stand up for America's national security and stop obstructing a thorough investigation into Russia's interference in our elections. Add your name if you agree.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bec/70cdc2ba/47514bac/397f2e7/1060689626/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-tell-congress-to-investigate-russia?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Itrsquos+time+to+put+pressure+on+every+m&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917")

Last week we saw the people of France unite against Russian interference in their election. That's what countries do when their democratic institutions are threatened by a hostile external actor.

This is a serious national security threat, and one that we need to address before Americans go to the polls again in less than 545 days. We don't have time for partisan political games.

[**It 's time to get to the bottom of how much Russia interfered in our democratic process and who may have been collaborating. The American people deserve answers.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bec/70cdc2ba/47514bac/397f2e4/1060689626/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-tell-congress-to-investigate-russia?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Itrsquos+time+to+get+to+the+bottom+of+ho&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917")

Thanks for standing up for what's right,

Chris

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bec/70cdc2ba/47514bac/397f2e5/1060689626/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bec/70cdc2ba/47514bac/397f2e2/1060689626/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

In any White House that should have been the equivalent of a five-alarm fire. But we know now that President Trump and his team did nothing -- nothing at all. name: Sen. Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: Demand answers on Trump's Russia ties
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Sally Yates is an American patriot.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e70b/2b07114c/52c55c4a/736efd45/1031981395/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-answers-on-russia-ties?source=PT-20170509-VanHollen-ProsHV")

Team,

Yesterday Sally Yates, the acting Attorney General fired by Donald Trump, testified before a Senate committee about her efforts to warn the Trump administration about improper contacts with Russian officials.

Let's be clear. The White House was told the National Security Director was a potential threat to America's security. And what did they do? Nothing at all, for 18 days, until the Washington Post reported that Flynn had lied to Vice President Pence -- and that's only the beginning.

[**The American people deserve the full truth about the Trump administration 's Russia connections. Add your name now to tell the White House to stop obstructing this investigation.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e70b/2b07114c/52c55c4a/736efd45/1031981395/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-answers-on-russia-ties?source=PT-20170509-VanHollen-ProsHV")

During the past few weeks, we've seen the Russian government attempt to interfere in the French elections using the same cyber tactics they used in the U.S.

Thankfully, the French government acted swiftly and decisively to denounce these tactics and protect their democratic process from outside interference -- and those outside efforts were unsuccessful.

Meanwhile here at home we see Republicans joining the Trump administration to block efforts to get to the bottom of what the Russians did in our elections and to attack those, like Sally Yates, who spoke up to try to protect our country.

**Sally Yates is an American patriot. Tell Republicans and the White House to stop obstructing the Senate investigation and standing in the way of finding the truth. The American people deserve answers.

[http://dscc.org/demand-answers-on-Russia-ties](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e70b/2b07114c/52c55c4a/736efd45/1031981395/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-answers-on-russia-ties?source=PT-20170509-VanHollen-ProsHV")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right,

Senator Chris Van Hollen

**A note on your support, friend:**

Senate Democrats are the first line of defense against all of Trump's reckless proposals. We're hard at work readying resources for the fights ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, we mean it when we say we're counting on you.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170509-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e70b/2b07114c/52c55c4a/736efd47/1031981395/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e70b/2b07114c/52c55c4a/736efd46/1031981395/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e70b/2b07114c/52c55c4a/736efd41/1031981395/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: SPECIAL ELECTION (via FlaDems.com)
subject: Sending a message to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Friend, BIG NEWS:

Rick Scott just announced the special election to fill the state Senate seat vacated by Frank Artiles will be on September 26.

**This special election gives Floridians our first opportunity to send an unmistakable message to Donald Trump: We 've had enough of your repulsive policies. [Help us win this seat today >>](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+win+this+seat+today+gtgt&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917&refcode=em050917")**

Frank Artiles resigned because of his racist and sexist comments.

We can show Donald Trump on September 26 we're done with his abhorrent actions, too. But only if we win this seat.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Appreciating our teachers
body:
Happy Teacher Appreciation Day!
#
Team --
In honor of Teacher Appreciation Day, I want to speak with you about my teachers, and how they made it possible for me to reach out to you today as a candidate for Governor of Florida.
I was a skinny kid who came from a big family - I'm the fifth of seven children. Some of my teachers had my older brothers in the years before me, and from time to time they found themselves in trouble. Despite all of this, they saw potential in me that I didn't see in myself. They invested extra time in me, time they didn't get paid for, and encouraged me to set my sights higher -- on honors classes, then on advanced placement classes, and finally on college.
And that's what's so amazing about public school -- no matter what your situation is at home, you have a teacher who cares about you, who believes in you, and who is working to help you succeed.
It's tough to quantify what it means to have someone believe in you. But I know that it means a lot -- and that it's yet another thing that isn't taken into consideration when our state government evaluates our teachers and determines their pay.
Our teachers do so much more than what we could ever see from any test their students take. And when I'm Governor, I'm going to make sure that we end this unfair form of evaluation, along with the unfair merit pay system. I believe we should trust our teachers, provide them the tools and resources they need to manage their classrooms and build their lesson plans, and pay them fairly for doing the most important job on earth -- shaping the future of humanity.
[**If you agree, add your name to endorse our plan for Florida teachers >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3370/9e00690/486364c9/240349a2/509126721/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/education")
All of these years later, my teachers and mentors are still supporting me. Just a few weeks ago, Dean Byrd, Ms. Awbrey from Gainesville High School, and Ms. Linda Knight joined us for an event in Gainesville:
They helped shape me into the person I am today, and as Governor, I'm going to do better for them and every Florida teacher. They deserve it.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3370/9e00690/486364c9/240349a5/509126721/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170509-teacher")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3370/9e00690/486364c9/240349a4/509126721/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3370/9e00690/486364c9/240349a7/509126721/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3370/9e00690/486364c9/240349a6/509126721/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
clean_body: Happy Teacher Appreciation Day! Team -- In honor of Teacher Appreciation Day, I want to speak with you about my teachers, and how they made it possible for me to reach out to you today as a candidate for Governor of Florida. I was a skinny kid who came from a big family - I'm the fifth of seven children. Some of my teachers had my older brothers in the years before me, and from time to time they found themselves in trouble. Despite all of this, they saw potential in me that I didn't see in myself. They invested extra time in me, time they didn't get paid for, and encouraged me to set my sights higher -- on honors classes, then on advanced placement classes, and finally on college. And that's what's so amazing about public school -- no matter what your situation is at home, you have a teacher who cares about you, who believes in you, and who is working to help you succeed. It's tough to quantify what it means to have someone believe in you. But I know that it means a lot -- and that it's yet another thing that isn't taken into consideration when our state government evaluates our teachers and determines their pay. Our teachers do so much more than what we could ever see from any test their students take. And when I'm Governor, I'm going to make sure that we end this unfair form of evaluation, along with the unfair merit pay system. I believe we should trust our teachers, provide them the tools and resources they need to manage their classrooms and build their lesson plans, and pay them fairly for doing the most important job on earth -- shaping the future of humanity. "" All of these years later, my teachers and mentors are still supporting me. Just a few weeks ago, Dean Byrd, Ms. Awbrey from Gainesville High School, and Ms. Linda Knight joined us for an event in Gainesville: They helped shape me into the person I am today, and as Governor, I'm going to do better for them and every Florida teacher. They deserve it. Bring it home, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: Add your name - we MUST have an independent investigation into Trump and Russia
body:
We need an independent investigation led by a special prosecutor
---
**Add your name: demand an independent investigation into Trump and his connections to Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170509_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170509_dnc3_nd")**
Friend --

Tonight, Donald Trump fired FBI Director James Comey -- the man leading the investigation into Trump's ties to Russia.

This is a deeply dangerous abuse of power, and it's further evidence that nobody in this administration can be trusted to lead an honest investigation into a serious national security issue.

**In order for Americans to get the truth about Donald Trump and Russia, there must be an independent investigation led by a special prosecutor. Add your name to demand one today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170509_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170509_dnc3_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfbb/4067b0a/2fc6506c3/7e772b46/3007589391/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170509_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170509_dnc3_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfbb/4067b0a/2fc6506c3/7e772b47/3007589391/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170509_dnc3_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfbb/4067b0a/2fc6506c3/7e772b44/3007589391/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170509_dnc3_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfbb/4067b0a/2fc6506c3/7e772b45/3007589391/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170509_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170509_dnc3_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
